excerpt: We are grateful to him equally during our calamities as during His blessings
source_location_hint: Introductory theological doctrine on divine providence

excerpt: the seal of all prophets and the perfection of the prophetic mission
The master of the children of Adam was announced by Jesus and invoked by Abraham
Whose excellence no speakers can attain, whose blessings no reckoners can enumerate—He created all creatures by His power and spread the winds by His mercy
The seal of the prophets, the chosen most noble, Muḥammad the Praised, the lord of creation
The Pure Imam bearing the prophetic summons, possessing the wisdom characteristic of the Ismāʿīlī tradition
source_location_hint: Imām doctrine and the ranks of wisdom

excerpt: To whom belongs the dominion of the heavens and the earth; He gives life and causes death
source_authority: Fatimid philosophical theology merged with Persian instruction

excerpt: He brings existence into being from non-existence and establishes the ranks of limits and boundaries
He fashioned creation according to the most perfect order and placed all things in their most secure position
source_location_hint: Divine creative wisdom and cosmic order

excerpt: He was sent for the guidance of all humanity toward paths of peace, extending through the span of nights and days
